message:
fix: rustfmt formatting in sort VJP and add conv2d kernel rank validation

- fj-ad: Apply rustfmt line-wrapping fixes in sort VJP (partial_cmp
  chains and dims iterator)
- fj-lax/tensor_ops: Add rank-4 validation guard for 2D convolution
  kernel tensor, returning a descriptive error instead of panicking
  on shape mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
